meaning: vt.使畅通,清除...的阻塞 扫除...的阻碍
examples: That won't flush out all the sewage, but it should unclog some stinking drains.
So here’s what we’re going to do: we’re going to unclog the arteries.
Mr Geithner sees this as a price worth paying to unclog Banks' balance-sheets.
Who better to unclog sewers or suck up nuclear waste than these remarkable machines?
At this point, I recalled a long-ago futile effort to unclog my junk e-mail account.
